description: Define region bounded by curves or lines
utility: Create filled regions for area visualization

examples.scenario: Region for disk method solid of revolution around y-axis with animated bounds
examples.expression:
varanim_1=variableanimator(at(3,20),"a",0.5,2)
varanim_2=variableanimator(at(5,20),"b",-1,0)
graph_1=g2d(at(4,30),19.4,21.4,range(-2,5),range(-4,4),type(plotting))
plot_1=implicitplot(graph_1,"x = y^2 + 1",c(teal))
line_1=line(graph_1,"y = a")
line_2=line(graph_1,"y = b")
line_3=line(graph_1,"x = 0")
region_1=region(graph_1, plot_1, line_1, line_2, line_3)
revolve_1=revolvedisk(at(2,1),view(17,16.9),region_1,axis(y),fc(red),rulings3d(64),sweep(0,360),slice(0.5),range(-3,3))

examples.scenario: Region for disk method revolution of x^2 around x-axis
examples.expression:
graph_1=g2d(at(4,30),19.4,21.4,range(-2,2),range(-2,2),type(plotting))
plot_1=plot(graph_1,"x^2",c(teal))
line_1=line(graph_1,"y = 0")
line_2=line(graph_1,"x = 0")
line_3=line(graph_1,"x = 1")
region_1=region(graph_1, plot_1, line_1, line_2, line_3)
revolve_1=revolvedisk(at(2,1),view(21,26),region_1,axis(x),fc(blue),rulings3d(64),sweep(0,360),slice(0.5))

examples.scenario: Two regions for shell method revolution with outer and inner boundaries
examples.expression:
graph_1=g2d(at(4,30),19.4,21.4,range(-1,5),range(-1,3),type(plotting))
plot_1=plot(graph_1,"sqrt(x)",c(teal))
plot_2=plot(graph_1,"x/4",c(orange))
line_1=line(graph_1,"x = 0")
line_2=line(graph_1,"x = 4")
line_3=line(graph_1,"y = 0")
region_1=region(graph_1, plot_1, line_1, line_2, line_3)
region_2=region(graph_1, plot_2, line_1, line_2, line_3, fc(pink))
revolve_1=revolveshell(at(2,1),view(17,16.9),region_1,region_2,axis(x),fc(purple),rulings3d(64),sweep(0,360),slice(0.5))

examples.scenario: Two regions for washer method revolution around x-axis
examples.expression:
graph_1=g2d(at(4,30),19.4,21.4,range(-1,3),range(-2,2),type(plotting))
plot_1=plot(graph_1,"x^2",c(teal))
plot_2=plot(graph_1,"x",c(orange))
line_1=line(graph_1,"x = 0")
line_2=line(graph_1,"x = 1")
line_3=line(graph_1,"y = 0")
region_1=region(graph_1, plot_1, line_1, line_2, line_3)
region_2=region(graph_1, plot_2, line_1, line_2, line_3, fc(pink))
revolve_1=revolvewasher(at(2,1),view(17,16.9),region_1,region_2,axis(x),fc(red),rulings3d(64),sweep(0,360),slice(0.5))
